error_signature: Unable to sign without access token
title: Gmail node unable to send email due to missing access token
symptom: When attempting to send an email using the Gmail node, the workflow fails with the error 'Unable to sign without access token'. This prevents the email from being sent.
applies_when: Credentials are created but not properly linked
not_this_if: Credentials were imported and work fine
root_cause: The error occurs because the Gmail node requires a valid access token to authenticate and send emails. If the credentials are not correctly set up or linked to the workflow, the node cannot obtain the necessary token.
fix_steps: Verify that the Gmail credentials are correctly configured in n8n.
Ensure that the credentials are linked to the Gmail node in your workflow.
agent_instruction: Check and re-link your Gmail credentials in the Gmail node settings.
